topic.title: 투자 포트폴리오 이해하기
topic.description: 투자 포트폴리오의 기본 개념과 중요성을 초급 수준에서 설명하는 콘텐츠입니다.

korean_scripts.korean_text: 안녕하세요, 투자 포트폴리오에 대해 설명해 주시겠어요?
간단히 말해, 다양한 종류의 투자 자산을 모아 놓은 것을 의미해요.
이는 투자의 위험을 분산시키는 좋은 방법입니다.
자신의 재정 목표와 위험 감수 성향에 맞게 자산을 배분하는 것이 중요해요.
장기적인 관점에서 꾸준히 관리하는 것이 성공의 열쇠입니다.

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: Hello, could you explain what an investment portfolio is?
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: Hello, | could you explain what an investment portfolio is? |

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: Simply put, it means a collection of various types of investment assets.
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: Simply put, | it means a collection of various types of investment assets. |

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: This is a good way to spread the risk of investment.
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: This is a good way | to spread the risk of investment. |

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: It's important to allocate assets according to your financial goals and risk tolerance.
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: It's important to allocate assets | according to your financial goals and risk tolerance. |

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: Consistently managing from a long-term perspective is the key to success.
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: Consistently managing | from a long-term perspective | is the key to success. |

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: Do you understand? Yes, thank you.
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: Do you understand? | Yes, thank you. |

keyword_speeches.target_sentence: Hello, could you explain what an investment portfolio is?
Simply put, it means a collection of various types of investment assets.
This is a good way to spread the risk of investment.
It's important to allocate assets according to your financial goals and risk tolerance.
Consistently managing from a long-term perspective is the key to success.
Do you understand? Yes, thank you.
